numerical_constraints.name: Gracht profiel I-I' total width

reasons: Dimension clearly annotated in plan drawing; total sum of sub-dimensions equals 12.00 m as labelled.

numerical_constraints.notes: Total profile width = 0.75 + 3.25 + 4.00 + 3.25 + 0.75 = 12.00 m. This is a cross-section profile for the canal-side street with two-directional cycling connection.

numerical_constraints.name: Gracht profiel I-I' central canal/water zone width
numerical_constraints.condition: Gracht - profiel I-I' (fietsverbinding twee richtingen); central zone

reasons: Dimension clearly labelled in cross-section drawing; interpretation of zone function (canal/water) inferred from context 'Gracht'.

numerical_constraints.notes: Central zone of 4.00 m within the 12.00 m total profile, flanked by two 3.25 m cycling lanes and two 0.75 m edge strips.

numerical_constraints.name: Gracht profiel I-I' cycle lane width (each direction)
numerical_constraints.condition: Gracht - profiel I-I' (fietsverbinding twee richtingen); per cycling direction

reasons: Dimension clearly labelled in cross-section drawing.

numerical_constraints.notes: Each of the two cycling lanes is 3.25 m wide, symmetrically placed either side of the central zone.

narrative_constraints.statement: Profile I-I' of the Gracht is designed as a two-directional cycling connection (fietsverbinding twee richtingen) with a total cross-section width of 12.00 m.

reasons: Clearly stated in the section heading; document type is 'other' (beeldkwaliteitplan), so binding status is limited but urban design intent is clear.

urban_intent_passages: Gracht - profiel I-I' (fietsverbinding twee richtingen): The canal profile is conceived as a two-directional cycling connection with a 12.00 m total cross-section, subdivided into two 3.25 m cycle lanes, a 4.00 m central zone, and two 0.75 m edge strips.
